headline: Here is Why SLB (SLB) is One of the Best Performing S&P 500 Stocks
summary: SLB N.V. (NYSE:SLB) is one of the best performing S&P 500 stocks so far in 2026. On April 24, SLB reported its Q1 2026 financial results, highlighted by a 3% year-on-year revenue increase to $8.72 billion.
